positive: An elegant, stylized celestial wanderer motif. The central subject is a stylized, anthropomorphic cosmic fox with a majestic, fluffy tail composed of nebula clouds and gentle stardust. It is depicted in a highly detailed, symmetrical silhouette against a deep, gradient midnight blue and violet cosmic background. The fox is posed looking slightly to the side, mid-stride, giving a sense of effortless grace. Incorporate flowing elements like constellations, crescent moons, and abstract galactic dust trails that curl around the figure. The overall aesthetic should be neo-traditional tattoo art meets cosmic vaporwave, featuring clean lines, strong contrasts (gold and cyan accents against deep space), and vibrant luminosity. The composition must be centered and scalable for apparel print, ensuring crisp edges and clear visual separation of elements.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, cropped, low resolution, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, dirty, messy, jpeg artifacts
